info.name: AssetFlow Backend API - Full Contract
info.description: Full backend API contract for AssetFlow, based on the organizer PS and mandatory features. Import this collection so frontend can build against the agreed endpoint set while backend implementation progresses stage by stage.

request.description: Optional endpoint for validating common error response shape during development.
QR scan mode: resolve scanned QR/asset code into asset detail.
Fallback scan/search mode for typed or scanned asset tags.

body.raw:
{
  "assetId": "{{assetId}}",
  "fromUserId": "{{userId}}",
  "toUserId": "{{targetUserId}}",
  "allocationId": "{{allocationId}}",
  "notes": "Device handed over with charger and bag"
}
